task_scope: GATE2 governance chain verification - policy applicability check for expense audit governance
policy_questions: Which policy versions govern expense reimbursements during the audit period?
Are there any conflicting or overlapping policy clauses?
execution_steps: Invoke policy-researcher subagent to determine policy applicability
complexity_reasons: MULTI_POLICY_VERSION_CHECK: need to determine which policy versions apply

policy_researcher.role_task: Determine which policy versions and clauses apply to expense audit governance for the 2024 calendar year. Examine available policy documents, extract effective dates, identify version relationships and conflicts. Write work/subagents/policy_researcher/policy_applicability.json with applicable_policies, excluded_policies, version_relationships, conflicts, and unresolved_items.
